resources.string: Block Reels & Shorts scrolling. Everything else works normally.
ScrollGuard shows a touch overlay in Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts that blocks vertical swipes and re-injects taps. Stories, DMs, and search are untouched. No data is collected.

Targets (v2):
• Instagram — Reels tab only
• YouTube — Shorts only

Taps always pass through. Other app areas are untouched.
Allow scrolling for (minutes) when entering Reels/Shorts
Shows remaining free-scroll time in Reels/Shorts
